query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documentoslideres (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  arquivo_url VARCHAR(1024),
  nome_arquivo VARCHAR(255),
  tamanho_arquivo INTEGER,
  tipo VARCHAR(100),
  ativo INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  arquivo_base64 TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user jbEC6vu1kEZPhSm.root --database cLUkBFbsZfcYG9rNRXMeP2 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documentoslideres (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  arquivo_url VARCHAR(1024),
  nome_arquivo VARCHAR(255),
  tamanho_arquivo INTEGER,
  tipo VARCHAR(100),
  ativo INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  arquivo_base64 TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
